message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate more bracket patterns to emitCallCtx

- io.zig: Nested @TypeOf in toPathStr
- signature.zig: @TypeOf with writeParamName
- print.zig: runtime.printPyObject
- value_generation.zig: PyValue.fromAlloc, UnifiedInt.fromI64, PyCallable.fromAny (2x)

Reduces emit(")" count from 107 to 103.

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-# Simple test to debug numpy.testing imports
-from numpy.testing import assert_
-print("numpy.testing imported successfully")
